answer:
The fastest way to reach the Town of Amherst is through Town Hall reception:

📞 902-667-3352
📧 info@amherst.ca
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/government.html

Open Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM. For life-safety emergencies, call 911.

Amherst Town Hall is located at 98 Victoria Street East, Amherst, NS.
Mailing address: PO Box 516, Amherst, NS B4H 4A1

Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca | Fax: 902-667-5409
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/government.html

Town Hall and the E-Service Amherst online portal can help with:

• Property tax payments
• Water and sewer billing
• Service requests and complaints
• Waste collection inquiries
• Facility bookings
• General Town inquiries

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca
🌐 How Do I?: https://www.amherst.ca/how-do-i.html

Report municipal issues (potholes, streetlights, water, missed collection, etc.) through E-Service Amherst — the Town's self-serve request portal:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/submit-a-service-request.html

For an unsightly or dangerous property complaint:
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/dangerous-unsightly-premises.html

After-hours Public Works emergencies: 📞 902-667-7227
Life-safety emergencies: 🚨 911

For after-hours Public Works emergencies (flooding, watermain break, downed tree, road hazard):

📞 Public Works dispatch: 902-667-7227
🚨 Life-safety emergencies: call 911

General Town Hall line: 902-667-3352
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html

Many Town services are available online:

• Pay bills: https://www.amherst.ca/pay-bills.html
• Submit a service request: https://www.amherst.ca/submit-a-service-request.html
• Book a town facility: https://www.amherst.ca/book-a-town-facility.html
• Download a form: https://www.amherst.ca/download-a-form.html

🌐 How Do I?: https://www.amherst.ca/how-do-i.html

Apply for a building permit and learn about the process here:

🌐 Building & Permits: https://www.amherst.ca/building-permits.html
🌐 Apply: https://www.amherst.ca/apply-for-a-building-permit.html

For permit questions:
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Download Town of Amherst maps (zoning, parks, and more):

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/download-a-map.html

For planning questions:
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

To check zoning and permitted uses, start with Planning & Economic Development and Plan Amherst:

🌐 Planning: https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html
🌐 Plan Amherst: https://www.amherst.ca/plan-amherst.html
🗺️ Maps: https://www.amherst.ca/download-a-map.html

Have your property address ready.
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Council and Committee meetings, agendas, and minutes:

🌐 Meetings: https://www.amherst.ca/council-and-committee-meetings.html
🌐 Agendas: https://www.amherst.ca/government/council-committee-agendas.html
🌐 Minutes: https://www.amherst.ca/government/council-committee-minutes.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

To speak or present at a Council meeting, review the meeting schedule and contact Town Hall to be added to the agenda:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/council-and-committee-meetings.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Council appoints residents to various advisory committees. Details and meeting schedules:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/council-and-committee-meetings.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Town of Amherst budget and financial information:

🌐 Finance: https://www.amherst.ca/finance.html
🌐 Budgets: https://www.amherst.ca/town-departments/finance/budgets.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

The Town's audited financial statements:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/town-departments/finance/financial-statements.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Town tax rates and by-laws (including the fee schedule):

🌐 Tax Rates: https://www.amherst.ca/tax-rates.html
🌐 By-laws: https://www.amherst.ca/government/bylaws.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Property taxes can be paid by online/telephone banking, in person at Town Hall (98 Victoria Street East), or by mail to PO Box 516, Amherst, NS B4H 4A1.

🌐 Pay Bills: https://www.amherst.ca/pay-bills.html
🌐 Tax Rates: https://www.amherst.ca/tax-rates.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Property assessments in Nova Scotia are handled by the Property Valuation Services Corporation (PVSC), not the Town.

📞 1-800-380-7775 | 🌐 pvsc.ca

For how assessment relates to your tax rate:
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/tax-rates.html
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

To report an unsightly or dangerous property, use the Building & Property Services Complaint Form:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/dangerous-unsightly-premises.html

To review Town by-laws:
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/government/bylaws.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Browse the Town of Amherst by-laws (noise, parking, property standards, and more):

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/government/bylaws.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Parking and by-law tickets in Amherst are handled by the Amherst Police Department. Pay a ticket here:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/ticket-payments.html

📞 Amherst Police (non-emergency): 902-667-8600

On-street parking is restricted overnight during winter for snow clearing (see below). For parking questions, contact Town Hall:

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html

During winter, on-street parking is restricted overnight so Public Works can clear snow and ice. Please keep vehicles off the street overnight during and after storms.

🌐 Public Works: https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html
📞 902-667-3352 | After-hours: 902-667-7227

Amherst Public Works handles snow and ice removal, prioritizing main routes and hills, then residential streets.

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html

After-hours Public Works emergencies: 📞 902-667-7227
General: 📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Road closures and traffic notices are posted under Public Notices and the Voyent Alert notification service:

🌐 Public Notices: https://www.amherst.ca/town-news/public-notices/
🌐 Voyent Alert: https://www.amherst.ca/town-has-new-tool-to-improve-communication-with-citizens.html

📞 902-667-3352 | After-hours: 902-667-7227

Contractors working in the road right-of-way should contact Public Works and review permit requirements:

🌐 Public Works: https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html
🌐 Building & Permits: https://www.amherst.ca/building-permits.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Construction and infrastructure updates are posted under Town News and Public Notices:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/town-news/public-notices/
🌐 Public Works: https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Service disruptions and facility notices are posted under Public Notices, and pushed through Voyent Alert:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/town-news/public-notices/
🌐 Voyent Alert: https://www.amherst.ca/town-has-new-tool-to-improve-communication-with-citizens.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

📱 Check the **Home tab** in this app for the latest Town of Amherst news.

For official Town news and notices:
🌐 Town News: https://www.amherst.ca/town-news/
🌐 Voyent Alert (emergency notifications): https://www.amherst.ca/town-has-new-tool-to-improve-communication-with-citizens.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Stay updated with the Bordertown Bulletin and Voyent Alert:

🌐 Bordertown Bulletin: https://www.amherst.ca/town-news/bordertown-bulletin/
🌐 Voyent Alert: https://www.amherst.ca/town-has-new-tool-to-improve-communication-with-citizens.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Water and sewer bills are issued quarterly. Payment options include online/telephone banking, in person at Town Hall, or by mail.

🌐 Water & Sewer: https://www.amherst.ca/water-and-sewer.html
🌐 Pay Bills: https://www.amherst.ca/pay-bills.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

If you see a watermain break or flooding, report it to Public Works immediately:

📞 After-hours Public Works dispatch: 902-667-7227
📞 Town Hall: 902-667-3352
🚨 Life-safety risk: call 911

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/submit-a-service-request.html

The Town contracts Miller Waste Systems for three-stream collection: garbage, recycling, and organics (green cart). Organics are collected weekly in summer; garbage and recycling on a set schedule by zone.

🌐 Solid Waste Collection: https://www.amherst.ca/solid-waste-collection.html
🌐 Collection Schedule: https://www.amherst.ca/collection-schedule.html
📱 App: "Cumberland County Solid Waste"

Missed pickup: 📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

To report a missed garbage, recycling, or organics pickup, submit a service request:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/submit-a-service-request.html
🌐 Solid Waste Collection: https://www.amherst.ca/solid-waste-collection.html

Have your address and collection date ready.
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

The Town's waste contract includes biweekly collection of one bulky item (washer, dryer, couch, chair, etc.). Check your collection schedule for details:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/solid-waste-collection.html
🌐 Schedule: https://www.amherst.ca/collection-schedule.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

You may need a building permit for additions, decks, finished basements, new construction, or structural, plumbing, and HVAC changes.

🌐 Building & Permits: https://www.amherst.ca/building-permits.html
🌐 Apply: https://www.amherst.ca/apply-for-a-building-permit.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

To book a building inspection, contact the Building department with your permit number:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/building-permits.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Pool and hot tub installations require a permit and a compliant fence/enclosure:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/building-permits.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Amherst Planning & Economic Development:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Development applications include rezonings, development agreements, subdivisions, and variances:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/development-applications.html
🌐 Planning: https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Plan Amherst is the Town's planning and land-use initiative:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/plan-amherst.html
🌐 Planning: https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

For development charges and related costs, contact Planning & Economic Development:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

📱 Check the **Events tab** in this app for upcoming programs and activities.

Town of Amherst recreation programming:
🌐 Fall/Winter/Spring: https://www.amherst.ca/fall-winter-spring-programming.html
🌐 Summer: https://www.amherst.ca/summer-programming.html
🌐 Book a Facility: https://www.amherst.ca/book-a-town-facility.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

📱 Check the **Events tab** for activity listings.

Amherst Stadium and recreation facilities:
🌐 Amherst Stadium: https://www.amherst.ca/amherst-stadium.html
🌐 Swimming: https://www.amherst.ca/swimming.html
🌐 Skating: https://www.amherst.ca/skating.html
🌐 Active Living & Recreation: https://www.amherst.ca/active-living-and-recreation-page-content.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Animal services in Nova Scotia are supported by the NS SPCA:

📞 1-888-703-7722 | 🌐 spcans.ca

For Town by-law related animal concerns:
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

For pet licensing and registration in Amherst, contact Town Hall:

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca
🌐 How Do I?: https://www.amherst.ca/how-do-i.html

For wildlife guidance in Nova Scotia, contact the NS Department of Natural Resources:

📞 1-800-565-2224

For Town by-law related concerns:
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Short-term rentals in Nova Scotia require provincial registration, in addition to any Town zoning rules:

🌐 Provincial Registry: https://novascotia.ca/short-term-rentals/
🌐 Town Planning: https://www.amherst.ca/planning-economic-development.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Marriage licences in Nova Scotia are issued through Access Nova Scotia / Vital Statistics (a provincial service). Visit the provincial site and search "marriage licence":

🌐 https://www.novascotia.ca

For help, contact Town Hall:
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Sign up for Voyent Alert to receive Town emergency notifications, and prepare a 72-hour emergency kit:

🌐 Voyent Alert: https://www.amherst.ca/town-has-new-tool-to-improve-communication-with-citizens.html
🌐 Nova Scotia EMO: https://novascotia.ca/emo/

🚨 Life-safety: call 911 | 📞 902-667-3352

The Town is served by the Amherst Fire Department, led by Fire Chief Greg Jones:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/fire.html

🚨 Fire emergency: call 911
Fire prevention or general questions:
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

For accessibility, inclusion, diversity, and equity (AIDE) resources:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/accessibility-inclusion-diversity-and-equity.html

To report a barrier, submit a service request:
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/submit-a-service-request.html
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

The Town posts bids, tenders, RFPs, and RFQs on its Procurement page:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/procurement.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

To submit a Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy (FOIPOP) request, contact Town Hall:

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/government.html

Search Town by-laws, policies, and reports:

🌐 By-laws: https://www.amherst.ca/government/bylaws.html
🌐 Policies: https://www.amherst.ca/government/policies.html
🌐 Reports: https://www.amherst.ca/government/reports-government.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

The Town of Amherst Strategic Plan (2024–2028):

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/strategic-plan.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Share your input through the Town's Survey Zone:

🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/survey-zone.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

For traffic safety concerns or a streetlight issue, contact Public Works or submit a service request:

🌐 Public Works: https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html
🌐 Service Request: https://www.amherst.ca/submit-a-service-request.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Mayor Rob Small and Town Council:

🌐 Mayor: https://www.amherst.ca/mayor-rob-small.html
🌐 Councillors: https://www.amherst.ca/councillors.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

📱 Check the **School tab** in this app for Amherst school announcements and closures.

Amherst schools are part of the Chignecto-Central Regional Centre for Education (CCRCE):
🌐 https://www.ccrce.ca
🌐 Town Education info: https://www.amherst.ca/education.html

For school sports schedules and results:

📱 Check the **School tab** in this app.
🌐 CCRCE: https://www.ccrce.ca

📱 Open the **School tab** in this app and tap **Snow Day Calculator** for an estimate based on current conditions.

For official closures:
🌐 CCRCE: https://www.ccrce.ca

Town snow clearing: https://www.amherst.ca/public-works.html

Intercity travel is available through Maritime Bus (service to Halifax, Moncton, and beyond):

🌐 https://www.maritimebus.com

For local transportation questions:
📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

For questions about privacy or protection of personal information, contact Town Hall:

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca
🌐 https://www.amherst.ca/government.html

The Town is served by the Amherst Police Department (APD), located at 21 Havelock Street:

📞 Non-emergency: 902-667-8600
🚨 Emergency: 911
🌐 Police: https://www.amherst.ca/police.html
🌐 Report a Crime: https://www.amherst.ca/reporting-a-crime.html

📱 Check the **Events tab** in this app for upcoming Amherst community events.

For the Town calendars and festivals:
🌐 Community Events Calendar: https://www.amherst.ca/community-events-calendar.html
🌐 Festivals & Events: https://www.amherst.ca/festivals-and-events.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

📱 Browse the **Directory tab** in this app to find local Amherst businesses by category.

Town business resources:
🌐 Business Directory: https://www.amherst.ca/business/business-directory.html
🌐 Starting a Business: https://www.amherst.ca/starting-a-business.html
🌐 Business: https://www.amherst.ca/business.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

For recycling of electronics, batteries, and household hazardous waste, use Divert NS enviro-depots and check the Town's waste guide:

🌐 Solid Waste Collection: https://www.amherst.ca/solid-waste-collection.html
🌐 Divert NS: https://www.divertns.ca

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

Current Town of Amherst job postings and career opportunities are listed here:

🌐 Employment: https://www.amherst.ca/employment.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca

There are many ways to get involved in Amherst:

🌐 Volunteer Opportunities: https://www.amherst.ca/volunteer-opportunities.html
🌐 Community Support Grants: https://www.amherst.ca/community-support-grants.html

📞 902-667-3352 | 📧 info@amherst.ca
